name: 13) Basil Chicken
method: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok over medium-high heat. When the oil starts shimmering, crack an egg into the wok and cook the eggs according to your preference. When done, place on a plate lined with paper towel to let the oil drain.

Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok over medium-high heat. When the oil starts shimmering, crack an egg into the wok and cook the eggs according to your preference. When done, place on a plate lined with paper towel to let the oil drain.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a separate skillet or wok over medium-high heat. When the oil starts to shimmer, fry the garlic, chili, and red onion for a minute.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a separate skillet or wok over medium-high heat. When the oil starts to shimmer, fry the garlic, chili, and red onion for a minute.
Stir-fry the minced meat for 4 to 5 minutes. If you find the meat too dry, add some water.
Stir-fry the minced meat for 4 to 5 minutes. If you find the meat too dry, add some water.
Add the holy basil and cook for another 30 seconds, stirring well. When done, turn off the heat
Add the holy basil and cook for another 30 seconds, stirring well. When done, turn off the heat
Serve on a plate with rice. Top the rice with stir-fry (Step 7) and its sauce. Finally, place the egg (Step 1) on top.
Serve on a plate with rice. Top the rice with stir-fry (Step 7) and its sauce. Finally, place the egg (Step 1) on top.
